title: Phone rus
description: Adds RP phones with messaging, passport IDs, battery charging, admin surveillance tools, app control roles, and handcuffs for player detention on Forge 1.20.1.
body:
FSB Phone Mod + Handcuffs
Forge 1.20.1

Adds RP phone system, apps, roles, messaging, monitoring tools and handcuffs for player detainment.

Perfect for RP servers, factions, government and social gameplay.

FEATURES

📱 Phones
- Phone (basic, no apps)
- iPhone (battery)
- NPhone (battery)
- GUI, apps, messages, passport ID

📲 Apps
- PassApp (player info)
- Max (messenger)
- Telega (messenger)
- FSB Monitor (view Max chats)

🔋 Battery
- Drains when using apps
- iPhone: -5% per use
- NPhone: -20% per use
- Charge Station to recharge

💬 Messengers
- Player chats
- Notifications
- Server-side storage
- 25 char limit, 3s cooldown

🛡 Roles
- FSB (monitor chats)
- RKN (lock apps)
- Max / Telega Admin (ban, delete chats)
- Handcuffs Access

🔗 Handcuffs
- Cuff players (RMB)
- Uncuff (Shift + RMB)
- Restricts movement and actions

🧱 Items
- Phone, iPhone, NPhone
- Handcuffs
- Charge Station

⚙ Commands
/fsb, /rkn, /max, /telega, /handcuffs

📌 Important
- Install on client + server
- Same jar required
- Restart after updates

🎯 For:
RP servers, factions, government systems, social gameplay

/give <player> fsb_phone_mod:item
